key.name: icon-type
key.description: Show album art thumbnail or the media player app icon

key.name: custom-icon-path
key.description: Path to a custom PNG or SVG image to use as the icon

key.name: separator
key.summary: Separator between title, artist, and album

key.name: icon-spacing
key.summary: Spacing between icon and text in pixels

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which section of the top bar to place the indicator

key.name: panel-index
key.summary: Position index within the panel section

key.name: hide-default-notification
key.description: Suppress the default media notification that appears in the system notification center

key.name: max-text-width
key.summary: Maximum text width in pixels (0 = unlimited)

key.name: popup-primary-color
key.description: Primary color for popup text and controls

key.name: popup-secondary-color
key.description: Secondary color for popup backgrounds and accents

key.name: popup-background-color
key.description: Custom background color for the popup. Leave empty to use the GNOME Shell theme default.

key.name: popup-show-app-icon
key.summary: Show source app icon on album art
key.description: Show the media player app icon badge on the album art thumbnail in the popup

key.name: popup-dynamic-bg
key.description: Extract the dominant color from album art and use it as the popup background

key.name: popup-dynamic-bg-intensity
key.description: Controls how bright or dark the dynamic background appears. Lower values are darker, higher values are brighter.

key.name: popup-show-visualizer
key.description: Show animated bars next to the track info that react to playback. Bars become dots when paused.

key.name: popup-compact-expand-mode
key.description: Choose whether multi-source compact rows expand on hover, click, or stay compact.

key.name: enhanced-pwa-support
key.description: When enabled, use advanced detection to find the correct PWA window for app icons. When disabled, use the app icon as reported by MPRIS.

key.name: art-cache-size-mb
key.summary: Album art cache size in megabytes
key.description: Maximum disk space used to cache downloaded album art. When the limit is hit, the least recently used art is removed.
